github.description: GitHub API access (create issues, PRs, read repos). ENABLED for automated issue creation and management.

filesystem.description: Extended filesystem operations beyond built-in tools. Enable if you need advanced file operations. Usually not needed - built-in tools are sufficient.

sqlite.description: SQLite database access. Enable if you add a SQLite database to the project.

notes: MCP servers are loaded when Claude Code starts.
IMPORTANT: After enabling/disabling servers, RESTART Claude Code for changes to take effect.
GitHub server is currently ENABLED for automated issue creation.
GitHub server requires GITHUB_TOKEN (set in .claude/settings.local.json or system env).
Environment variables: Use ${VAR_NAME} syntax, resolved at startup.
Personal MCP servers go in ~/.claude.json (user scope), not here.
Skills will fall back to 'gh' CLI if MCP tools not available.
